title: June Sponsor Roundup
excerpt: 1. Freckled Fawn | 2. Bluebird Chic | 3. Amy Kathryn | 4. Ann-Marie Loves Paper | 5. Beauty Box | 6. Junelily | 7. Liz Lamoreux | 8. Studio Calico | 9. Saturated Canary | 10. Elle's Studio |…
body:
1. Freckled Fawn | 2. Bluebird Chic | 3. Amy Kathryn | 4. Ann-Marie Loves Paper | 5. Beauty Box | 6. Junelily | 7. Liz Lamoreux | 8. Studio Calico | 9. Saturated Canary | 10. Elle's Studio | 11. Simon Says Stamp | 12. Everyday Storyteller

After much thought and consideration, I decided to offer monthly sponsorship spots here on my blog. It started in May and I want to continue showcasing different creative partners whose products or services would pique the interest of my loyal and diverse audience (that would be you, wonderful readers!). If you are looking to gain more exposure for your business or blog in a creative, nurturing environment, I would love to discuss potential collaborative opportunities with you!

Only a few spot are open for July. If you're interested in reading more about a monthly sponsorship opportunity, e-mail me at hello@amytangerine.com. Thanks!
